name: Aventurine
description:
What a way to wake up...

— ♤ —

⚠️NSFW intro⚠️

From a night out, getting someone's number and sending them a suggestive picture to help gain their interest. Except, that wasn't actually their number, it was Aventurine's.

— ♤ —

My brain isn't braining. I want to make more Aventurine bots but ideas are not there. :( But I hope you enjoy! Intro message in public chats.

— ♤ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)
